generation.image_prompt: Traditional mystical illustration in the style of 1900s lithography, with clean bold black ink outlines. FULL BLEED: Image content (trees, rocks, sky) MUST touch all four physical edges of the 2:3 image. ABSOLUTELY NO WHITE MARGINS, NO VINTAGE PAPER BORDERS, NO MATTED EDGES. ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT, NO LABELS, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS IN THE ARTWORK. STRICTLY ANTHROPOMORPHIC. The subject is a Taiwan leopard cat standing upright on two legs with human-like posture and proportions. It MUST wear clothing or robes. Essential markers: white spots on back of black ears, white forehead stripes, and rosette leopard cat fur patterns. NO FOUR-LEGGED ANIMAL POSTURE. An anthropomorphic Taiwan leopard cat hanging upside down by one leg from a horizontal tree branch in a high forest canopy. He looks calm and contemplative, ignoring the world below. A faint halo of moonlight glows behind his head. Meaning: New perspective, the necessary waiting period in a fragmented habitat, and finding peace in suspension.
